analyses.extracted_answer: Manual reconciliation and settlement delays across premium collections, agent commissions, and customer refunds — no centralised payment platform exists.
AIA is facing upcoming regulatory changes from MAS around payment infrastructure resilience.
Insurance agents, finance teams, and end customers seeking refund payouts.
No centralised payment platform; manual processes via spreadsheets and batch file exchanges with 3–5 day settlement cycles.
Reduce settlement time and operational cost of reconciliation.
Reduced reconciliation time by 70%, fewer payment exceptions, same-day domestic settlement.
Automated multi-rail reconciliation, exception handling with SLA alerting, agent commission disbursement, customer refund processing, compliance audit ledger.
Assumes SEPA-equivalent domestic rails are available and core banking APIs can expose settlement data.
Phased delivery preferred — MVP targets reconciliation and exception handling first.
